title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell discusses the evolution of software engineering from manual coding to teams of autonomous agents. He reports that agent requests have exploded in 2025, 30% of Cursor's PRs are fully agent-developed, and enterprise AI-generated code rose from 15% to 75% in a year. Engineers are becoming agent managers overseeing parallel autonomous colleagues.
